_comment: Rhea Test Cases - Biochemical reactions database
_note: Rhea provides expert-curated biochemical reactions with ChEBI compounds, EC numbers, UniProt enzymes, and pathway mappings

custom_tests.name: Check reaction has full attributes
custom_tests.description: Verify Rhea entries have equation, direction, status

custom_tests.name: Check SMILES present for reactions
custom_tests.description: Verify reaction SMILES are stored when available

custom_tests.name: Check hierarchies present
custom_tests.description: Verify parent/child relationships are stored for reactions that have them

custom_tests.name: Check EC number cross-references
custom_tests.description: Verify Rhea reactions link to EC numbers

custom_tests.name: Check UniProt enzyme cross-references
custom_tests.description: Verify Rhea reactions link to UniProt enzymes

custom_tests.name: Check ChEBI compound cross-references
custom_tests.description: Verify Rhea reactions link to ChEBI compounds
